mapper.select: SELECT `code` FROM user WHERE `type` = #{userType} AND `code` LIKE CONCAT(#{codePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY `code` DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.`id` , a.`code` , a.`password` , a.`name` , a.`phone` , a.`email` , a.`type` , a.`created_at` , a.`is_deleted` , a.`is_locked` , a.`is_temp_password` , a.`sign_url` , a.`profile_url`
-- HQ , c.`id` AS `departmentId` , d.`id` AS `dutyId` , e.`id` AS `positionId`
-- FRANCHISE , f.`id` AS `franchiseId`
-- SUPPLIER , g.`id` AS `supplierId` , g.`code` AS `supplierCode` FROM `user` a LEFT JOIN `hq_user_detail` b ON a.`id` = b.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `department` c ON b.`department_id` = c.`id` LEFT JOIN `duty` d ON b.`duty_id` = d.id LEFT JOIN `position` e ON b.`position_id` = e.id LEFT JOIN `franchise` f ON a.`id` = f.`owner_id` LEFT JOIN `supplier` g ON a.`id` = g.`supplier_id` WHERE a.`code` = #{userCode}

SELECT a.`id` , a.`code` , a.`name` , a.`phone` , a.`email` , a.`type` , a.`profile_url` AS `profileUrl` , c.`id` AS `departmentId` , c.`name` AS `departmentName` , d.`id` AS `dutyId` , d.`name` AS `dutyName` , e.`id` AS `positionId` , e.`name` AS `positionName` FROM `user` a LEFT JOIN `hq_user_detail` b ON a.`id` = b.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `department` c ON b.`department_id` = c.`id` LEFT JOIN `duty` d on b.`duty_id` = d.id LEFT JOIN `position` e on b.`position_id` = e.id WHERE a.`type` = 'HQ' AND a.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND a.`is_deleted` = FALSE
AND c.`id` = #{departmentId}

SELECT a.`id` , a.`code` , a.`name` , a.`phone` , a.`email` , a.`type` , a.`profile_url` AS `profileUrl` , b.`id` AS `franchiseId` , b.`code` AS `franchiseCode` , b.`name` AS `franchiseName` , b.`address` AS `franchiseAddress` , b.`address_detail` AS `franchiseAddressDetail` , b.`zipcode` AS `franchiseZipcode` , b.`business_number` AS `franchiseBusinessNumber` , b.`phone` AS `franchisePhone` , b.`signed_at` AS `franchiseSignedAt` FROM `user` a LEFT JOIN `franchise` b ON a.`id` = b.`owner_id` WHERE a.`type` = 'FRANCHISE' AND a.`is_deleted` = FALSE AND a.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT a.`id` , a.`code` , a.`name` , a.`phone` , a.`email` , a.`type` , a.`profile_url` AS `profileUrl` , b.`id` AS `supplierId` , b.`code` AS `supplierCode` , b.`name` AS `supplierName` , b.`ceo_name` AS `supplierCeoName` , b.`company_phone` AS `supplierCompanyPhone` , b.`address` AS `supplierAddress` , b.`zipcode` AS `supplierZipcode` , b.`business_number` AS `supplierBusinessNumber` , b.`signed_at` AS `supplierSignedAt` FROM `user` a LEFT JOIN `supplier` b ON a.`id` = b.`supplier_id` WHERE a.`type` = 'SUPPLIER' AND a.`is_deleted` = FALSE AND a.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT c.`id` AS `departmentId` , c.`name` AS `departmentName` , c.`depth` AS `depth` FROM `user` a LEFT JOIN `hq_user_detail` b ON a.`id` = b.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `department` c ON b.`department_id` = c.`id` WHERE a.`id` = #{userId}
SELECT id FROM franchise WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
